pageDescription: View known vulnerabilities detected in your installed software

cloudNotConfigured.title: Cloud Agent Required
cloudNotConfigured.description: CVE scanning requires the Cloud Agent to be linked. Go to Settings → Cloud to connect your device.

cloudNotConnected.title: Cloud Agent Not Connected
cloudNotConnected.description: The Cloud Agent is not currently connected. Check your connection in Settings → Cloud.

emptyState.title: No Vulnerabilities Detected
emptyState.description: No known CVEs were found in your installed software. Your system looks secure!

filter.noResults: No vulnerabilities match your current filters

error.title: Failed to Load Vulnerabilities
error.description: Could not retrieve vulnerability data from the server. Try refreshing or check your cloud connection.
